title: Water and Lava Normals
description: Based on Vibrant visuals. It makes water in shaders have reflections to make it prettier.
body:
Based on Vibrant visuals. It makes water in shaders have reflections to make it prettier. And also adds normals to lava, to also make it look better. it is more notable when shown against daylight.

It works on both LabPBR and SeusPBR. Just need to activate Advanced materials depending on the shaders you are using.

![No can stop the LAVA!! THE ANGER!! THE FEAR!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79c61d0f8a89be8340a405f33a546e3a747538dc.gif)![Water is the softest thing, yet it can penetrate mountains and earth. (only in real life)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab6e9c4aec9611c166c817a911e6eb830a35f70d.gif)
